preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Caleb, you're up.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Caleb.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: I'm just--

raw_text: At the mast? All righty. As you wake up, you spin, fire. This ray streaks past. All the guards, who are calm at this point, see this happen, and watch the streak go by and detonate on the ship. The bright flash of light echoes against everybody's faces as the impact hits. Go ahead and roll damage.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: She was over here.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: In your state-- where do you want to put it?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Well, where's Avantika? I don't know.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: You don't know. Where are you putting it?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: I'm putting it there, at the mast.

trigger_phrase: you make your way to the open
raw_text: Eventually, you make your way to the open waters in the vicinity of-- Orly goes with you each day and looks about and gives you the once-over and goes, "I'm pretty sure that we're pretty dang close to that place you were asking about."

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: It's like in Mary Poppins; everyone holds the china.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Exactly!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns_last5.text: And 12 o'clock.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: And let's go.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: You're so stupid, Rose.

raw_text: All right, so you guys have another night's rest. As you wake up the next morning, it is raining. There appears to be a small storm making its way in there.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: There was no battle. There was no battle with Avantika, man!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: We're not on the boat, we're in sand.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: There's no nothing.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: We're sitting in your mom's sitting room right now.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: You look up and on the side, there's the Plank King and Avantika looking at him. He's like, "Where you'd find these people?" (laughter)

raw_text: All right, all of you now have the capability for the next 24 hours to breathe underwater. Your lungs feel heavier than they do while you breathe air. It's unique. No gills sprout from the side of your neck, per se, but the air itself seems to have a weight to it, and you're like (exhales). It's still breathable air, but the process seems to have changed a bit.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: No, that was Keyleth. Sorry.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: It was literally just Beau singing.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Just me trying to do--

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Well, while it's happening, because it was such a good song, I will cast Underwater Breathing on all seven of us.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: My song was that good.

raw_text: All right. That ends Yasha's turn. Caleb. You are conscious, prone, floating, sinking towards the ground as you come to consciousness as Yasha grabs and jolts you awake.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: (sword whoosh) You duck out of the way. "What the hell?"

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: There's that whole thing about them which I kind of knew going into this. Sorry. Bye!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: DEBORAH
preceding_turns_last5.text: Shit.

preceding_turns_last5.text: Yasha's just like looking around the boat.

raw_text: Help put it out, for those who are still burning in flames, you find yourselves back in the hull of the ship. You see the crew, half of the crew is sitting there, looking intense, the sphere resting on the center of one of the tables off to the side, and as soon as the first of you emerge, they're like, (starts) "Where have you been?! What's going on?" Orly pushes forward and goes, "Where all you been hanging?" (whooshing) A few more appear. (impacts) Eventually, everyone makes their way out of the sphere.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TALIESIN

raw_text: As the storm subsides slowly over the next few hours, and one by one, you all eventually find yourself feeling comfortable to return to your quarters for an evening's rest, the day's travel comes to a complete circle. The morning comes with clear skies as the distant gray fades in the north. Another half day's travel leads you to see a few bodies of land on the horizon.

raw_text: Okay. You keep an eye out there and spend the next hour or so, as you guys are coming into position, scanning the shores of each of the islands. There's no sign of civilization. They're mostly dangerous, jagged, rocky shores with pebbled beaches, and bits and pieces of hints of mangrove clusters at certain points of the shore, and elements of the occasional bit of jungle you can see in pockets or valleys on each island. For the most part, you don't see any sign of civilization.
